title: 7 jq Commands for Faster JSON Inspection
summary: Read messy JSON faster and pull out exactly what you need with jq commands for formatting, filtering, field selection, aggregation, and clean terminal output.
verification_setup: Replace the placeholder JSON file path and API URL before running the commands.
Use JSON input whose field names match the example expressions.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/jq_commands_for_faster_json_inspection.sh with real JSON files or API responses.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example JSON file paths, field names, and API URL before running.
